action.reasoning: Observation: Pretrained MetricGAN+ achieves PESQ=3.134. Analysis: Fine-tuning on the VoiceBank+DEMAND training data should improve performance. The train.py has a bug (F.pad used before F is imported). I need to fix this and run training. I'll fine-tune the MetricGAN+ generator with STFT loss + L1 loss. Decision: Fix train.py and run fine-tuning for 10 epochs to see if we can improve PESQ.
